latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Two worlds. One destiny.
 
#AmericanBornChinese, an Original series, is streaming May 24 on @DisneyPlus.
Flounder. Pumbaa. Olaf. Pua. Tuk Tuk. And now... Splat and Legend. Welcome two adorable new sidekicks in #StrangeWorld, only in theaters November 23!

Watch as the cast and filmmakers of @MarvelStudios' Black Panther: Wakanda Forever share a special message with fans around the world. 🖤 Return to the wonder of Wakanda, and see the film in theaters today.
Be on the lookout for these hidden details scattered throughout Pandora at Disney’s Animal Kingdom Theme Park next time you visit @WaltDisneyWorld! 🔎
A true visionary. Go behind the making of @MarvelStudios’ Black Panther: Wakanda Forever, only in theaters this Friday. Get tickets now at the link in bio.
Discover six all-new stories in Zootopia+, an Original series streaming Wednesday only on @DisneyPlus. 🐰🐾🐭
"It's three generations learning to be okay with everyone charting their own course." 🙌 See the Thanksgiving movie event, Disney’s #StrangeWorld, only in theaters November 23!
Once upon a time, there was a mouse. 🐭  Mickey: The Story of a Mouse is streaming November 18, only on @DisneyPlus.

Prepare to share memories and magic this holiday season with family and friends, old and new. Join Disney in celebrating 75 years of support for Toys for Tots to help deliver joy to children in need. Donate a toy online for the Disney Ultimate Toy Drive at @shopDisney through December 24, 2022! Learn more at the link in bio. #FromOurFamilyToYours
latestIgtvVideos.title: Prepare to share memories and magic this holiday season with family and fri

latestIgtvVideos.caption: Discover a fairy tale with a wicked twist. #Disenchanted, an Original movie, starts streaming November 18 on @DisneyPlus.

Being Santa can be a bumpy sleigh ride. 🎅

The two-episode premiere of #TheSantaClauses, a brand-new Original series, is streaming November 16 on @DisneyPlus!

This holiday season is going to be out of this world.
 
Watch the brand-new trailer for Marvel Studios’ Special Presentation: The Guardians of the Galaxy Holiday Special, streaming November 25 only on @DisneyPlus.

latestPosts.caption:
Star Wars returns to the big screen with The Mandalorian and Grogu.
 
Watch the trailer now and experience the film, starring Pedro Pascal, only in theaters and IMAX May 22.

The ocean chose her for a reason. 🌊
Experience Disney’s #Moana, only in theaters July 10.

Times may change but friends are forever
#ToyStory5 is only in theaters June 19

PoohOV: You’re joining Pooh on the sweetest adventure ever in the Hundred Acre Wood. 🍯
 
Stream The Many Adventures of Winnie the Pooh on @DisneyPlus. #WinnieThePooh100
Meet all new creatures and droids when Star Wars returns to the big screen with The Mandalorian and Grogu, only in theaters and IMAX May 22.
The Devil Wears Prada 2 arrives only in theaters May 1. Get tickets now.
